parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Skip installation; changing it changes installed artifacts and local repository state

parameter.name: installAtEnd
parameter.description: Install artifacts at end of multi-module build (changes installed project state on failure)

parameter.name: file
parameter.description: The file to install; changing it changes the installed artifact contents

parameter.name: groupId
parameter.description: GroupId of the artifact; changing it changes the installed artifact coordinates

parameter.name: artifactId
parameter.description: ArtifactId of the artifact; changing it changes the installed artifact coordinates

parameter.name: version
parameter.description: Version of the artifact; changing it changes the installed artifact coordinates

parameter.name: packaging
parameter.description: Packaging type of the artifact; changing it changes the installed artifact format

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier of the artifact; changing it changes the installed artifact coordinates

parameter.name: pomFile
parameter.description: POM file to install; changing it changes installed metadata and project state

parameter.name: generatePom
parameter.description: Generate a minimal POM; changing it changes installed metadata

parameter.name: javadoc
parameter.description: Javadoc artifact to install; changing it changes installed artifacts

parameter.name: localRepositoryPath
parameter.description: Local repository path; changing it changes where installed artifacts are written

parameter.name: sources
parameter.description: Sources artifact to install; changing it changes installed artifacts
